{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113224729D5E1BE337A610A2BED"}"},"total":2313},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7155050571618304809","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"122万字27个小时，评论也大概都看了所以用的时间久了点，但是作者书写的还挺好的。看完有更敬畏举头三尺有神明这种的感觉，而且作者本人虽然小自恋但是文风挺平和。要不是篇幅长了一些有点自传风格写的也随意，拆出来其中有的比较精彩的故事好好打磨的话，很有价值呀。
里面挺多感人动容的故事的，不管是他身边的，还是他从业中见到的故事。作者和师父师姐的师门感情，行内关爱他的黄婆婆像奶奶一样，司徒师父还有吉老太的同行帮助，还有他的好基友傻子胡生死之交，他和老婆彩姐清淡但是守候型的爱情等等。
从业过程中遇到的痴情的镯子上被军官负心的大小姐鬼，苦情的各种爱情再比如那个校园里为了那场师生恋年过四十怀念爱情的大学老师，亲情外婆去世照看孙子不让鬼魅过分欺负她外孙的故事，看的过程中偶尔甚至羡慕作者丰富的人生经历。","text_exts":[{"e":286,"s":283,"text":"师生恋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B8%88%E7%94%9F%E6%81%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774070567610A2BED%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227155050571618304809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226983297361812392973%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B8%88%E7%94%9F%E6%81%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1665915091,"group_id":"6983297361812392973","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小池残暑退，高树早凉归","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/guVLTaaOXQqPW1IyENz/c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"347875771947228","user_name":"枣图冬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347875771947228","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297361812392973","book_info":{"abstract":"李诣凡头皮发麻的猎鬼记录!
当代版聊斋志异！头皮发麻的猎鬼记录！曾经在贴吧首发，三个月内点击率迅速破亿！悬疑大神李诣凡成名作，补全未出版的后续故事！所有鬼魂，都是死去的人。我是一名职业猎鬼人。转罗盘、绕红绳、撒香灰、念灵咒，寻得人世间虚无魂魄，解开痴情儿女生死心结。贪嗔痴恨随风飘散，伶仃野鬼迷途归天。这，就是我的工作。十四年职业生涯里，我碰到过满脸是血伸出头来的邪童、张开阴爪吃掉活人的山鬼、冤魂不散随机害人的灵缺……如果你想知道我怎么处理，答案就藏在这本书里。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/a94e9a202e0fc6f17e99d9541dbfeb0a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李诣凡","author_id":"","book_id":"6983297361812392973","book_name":"十四年猎诡人（全五册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"707.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7402499070167632921","read_count":"20659","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1225914"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"200","tags":"悬疑脑洞,精品小说,悬疑推理,灵异,第一人称,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/a94e9a202e0fc6f17e99d9541dbfeb0a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254567&x-signature=q9E2XFt5Rs8d2bmE%2BTsqGrlIi4k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.23228305e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113224729D5E1BE337A610A2BED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":47,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":123227,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":48284},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7149784621701120801","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在我看来真的很真实，特别是有的时候吃瓜就吃到了自己家。而且里面讲的一些是感觉很有帮助，对自己的一些心性还有观点也有一定的帮助。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664689118,"group_id":"6983297361812392973","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N53ywhYl0BA3Fzep94DaYWM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"906430780022407","user_name":"用户90643078"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"906430780022407","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297361812392973","book_info":{"abstract":"李诣凡头皮发麻的猎鬼记录!

_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113224729D5E1BE337A610A2BED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":160,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14222,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":210677},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7099675860018086667","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很久没有看到写的这么好的书，语气平淡又描述的很入情入理，与其说是小说，我觉得很像是文笔很好的日记，我第一次觉得很近距离的感受玄学的奇妙，前面还被吓得不敢睡觉，而后面对于人物的描写，让我觉得，生活就是如此，每个人都活的鲜明又平凡。谢谢你，李诣凡。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653022219,"group_id":"6983297361812392973","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6OiLjJVDzJDOVq/YR5FfTehJ2TQPQyIb4jVD5/apZCF","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"2604060105512967","user_name":"喵崽崽～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2604060105512967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1728531838,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297361812392973","book_info":{"abstract":"李诣凡头皮发麻的猎鬼记录!
